movie.synopsis: Best-selling author Wang Pu Tao and rookie editor Feng Tian Lan become unlikely colleagues. Their adventure begins when Feng Tian Lan, drawn to a novel, starts working at a publishing house and is assigned to remind Wang Pu Tao to submit her work. After a delay, they meet at a bar, where Wang Pu Tao sets conditions for her submission, leading them on a shared journey.
